reason: The Configuration A/B + Runtime Canary stepwise-action contracts this task rewrites: separate records/APIs, manual evidence gates, resource ownership, shared-Gateway mutex (now per-canary gateway), progress polling, legacy-row compat.
Telemetry resolution + backing-runtime log-group prefix discovery + online-eval wiring — needed to point per-variant online-eval at each NAMED-ENDPOINT log group/service.name (was -DEFAULT).
In-place UpdateAgentRuntime + AgentSpec.code_bundle multi-file deploy + config-bundle graft — the precedent for minting v_candidate from an edited spec at canary setup.
Shared experiment/canary sub-page table + URL-param selection + handoff params + testids — the frontend surface the single-agent + candidate-edit canary flow must fit.
